recommendations.title: Man from Deep River
recommendations.overview: A photographer in the rain forest is captured by wild natives, and after months of living with them, he marries the chief's daughter and helps protect the village from a vicious cannibal tribe.

recommendations.title: Cannibal Ferox
recommendations.overview: Three friends out to disprove cannibalism meet two men on the run who tortured and enslaved a cannibal tribe to find emeralds, and now the tribe is out for revenge.

recommendations.title: Ghosthouse
recommendations.overview: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past.

recommendations.title: Nightmare City
recommendations.overview: A reporter and his doctor wife try to escape from the hordes of bloodthirsty, undead people exposed to nuclear radioactivity as military leaders fight a losing war of attrition against the relentless attacks.

recommendations.title: Almost Human
recommendations.overview: A psychotic small-time criminal realizes that the everyday robberies, rapes and murders he commits aren't profitable enough, so he figures to hit the big time by kidnapping the daughter of a rich man.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Beach
recommendations.overview: In Miami, Florida, biker gang leader Edward "Diablo" Santer is about to be executed for murder when he proclaims his innocence and vows revenge from the grave. When a mysterious biker comes to town during Spring Break festivities, leaving several tee

recommendations.title: Shelby Oaks
recommendations.overview: A woman's obsessive search for her missing sister leads her into a terrifying mystery at the hands of an unknown evil.

recommendations.title: The Boy and the Beast
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Kyuta, a boy living in Shibuya, and Kumatetsu, a lonesome beast from Jutengai, an imaginary world. One day, Kyuta forays into the imaginary world and, as he's looking for his way back, meets Kumatetsu who becomes his spirit guide. That encounter lead

recommendations.title: The Summit of the Gods
recommendations.overview: A photojournalist's obsessive quest for the truth about the first expedition to Mt. Everest leads him to search for an esteemed climber who went missing.

recommendations.title: The Skin I Live In
recommendations.overview: A brilliant plastic surgeon creates a synthetic skin that withstands any kind of damage. His guinea pig: a mysterious and volatile woman who holds the key to his obsession.
